title: Gold Glitter Happy Engagement Banner 12 Pcs Balloons Engagement Bunting Banner with Ribbon and Diamond Ring Happy Engagement Decorations Party Props Engagement Proposal Party
features: Happy Engagement Party Decorations:This set of party decorations is designed to celebrate a happy engagement. Includes: 1 ‘Happy Engagement’ gold glitter letter banner, 10 colourful pennants, 12 balloons in 3 different colours and 1 beautiful diamond ring shape decoration Engagement decorations are excellent for parties or photo shoots.

Gold Glitter Banner and Coloured Bunting:‘Happy Engagement’ letter banners are made of gold glitter paper, even in low light environment, they can shine charmingly and become the highlight of the party. Colourful pennants and balloons were combined in a harmonious colour scheme. Diamond ring shaped decorations add a romantic touch to the party.

3 Kinds of Balloons:The balloons are available in a variety of colour choices, 4 gold paper sheet balls, 4 gold balloons and 4 balloons with white latex are designed to add a festive atmosphere to the party. Each balloon is easy to inflate and reusable.

Suitable Size:Each triangle banner measures 18 cm (7.08 inches) high and 13 cm (5.11 inches) wide. Diamond ring shape ornament with delicate design, 7.5 cm high and 8.5 cm wide. The letter banner ‘Ha’ measures 7 cm high by 12 cm wide. The right size creates a warm, romantic and joyful atmosphere.

Easy to Set Up:All the engagement party props are carefully designed and easy to set up. Each letter,gold bunting and ring is independent, need to DIY by yourself, all letters, triangles flags and rings can be adjusted along the ribbon through. Whether hanging on the wall, door or ceiling, it is easy to create a great party effect. Perfect for engagement party, proposal site, or any occasion to celebrate love and commitment.
description: Product Description Gold Engagement Banner Diamond Ring Party Decoration Props Engagement Ribbon For Proposal Engagement Wedding Party Product Details You Will Get This engagement party decoration includes 1 gold ‘Happy Engagement’ glitter banner, 10 bunting triangles, 12 12’ balloons and 1 ring. High Quality Materials This engagement banner is made of paper material, which is not easy to be damaged or deformed, and can be reused many times to meet your needs! Easy to Use This engagement decoration is easy to install, you just need to string the decoration through the ribbon, which can save you a lot of time and energy. Widely Used Perfect for hanging on the wall, door, ceiling or dessert table, creating a warm, romantic and joyful atmosphere; also a perfect choice for the background of the photo shoot.
